_notifications_printReminderBody.translation: Your film roll for " {{bestName}} " is 80% full. Don't forget to send it to print.

_notifications_incompleteActivityBody.translation: Keep shooting for " {{bestName}} ". Your camera roll is waiting for you.

_notifications_albumReadyBody.translation: Your memories are waiting for you in the album " {{bestName}} ".

_notifications_joinRequestBody.translation: {{email}} - " {{activityName}} " would like to participate in your activity.

_notifications_requestApprovedTitle.translation: Your Participation Request has been Approved!

_notifications_requestApprovedBody.translation: You can participate in the " {{activityName}} " activity.

_notifications_requestRejectedBody.translation: Your request to participate in the activity " {{activityName}} " was not accepted.

_notifications_specialJoinRequestBody.translation: {{email}} - " {{activityName}} " would like to participate in your activity.

_notifications_specialRequestApprovedTit.translation: Your Participation Request has been Approved!

_notifications_specialRequestApprovedBod.translation: You can participate in the " {{activityName}} " activity.

_notifications_specialRequestRejectedBod.translation: Your request to participate in the activity " {{activityName}} " was not accepted.

_notifications_specialParticipantRemoved.translation: You have been removed from the activity " {{activityName}} ".
